SELECT h3GetResolution(h3index) AS resolution FROM h3_indices WHERE h3IsValid(h3index);
SELECT h3GetResolution(h3index) AS resolution FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index IN (SELECT h3index FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index < 600000000000000000);
SELECT h3GetResolution(h3index) AS resolution FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index = (SELECT MAX(h3index) FROM h3_indices);
SELECT h3GetResolution(h3index) AS resolution FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index IN (SELECT h3index FROM h3_indices WHERE h3IsValid(h3index) ORDER BY h3index LIMIT 5);
SELECT h3GetResolution((SELECT h3index FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index > 600000000000000000 LIMIT 1)) AS resolution;
SELECT h3GetResolution(h3index) AS resolution FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index = (SELECT MIN(h3index) FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index IS NOT NULL);
WITH (SELECT MAX(h3index) FROM h3_indices) AS max_index SELECT h3GetResolution(max_index) AS resolution;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_indices WHERE h3GetResolution(h3index) <= 5;
CREATE TABLE valid_indices AS SELECT h3index FROM h3_indices WHERE h3IsValid(h3index);
SELECT h3GetResolution(h3index) FROM valid_indices WHERE h3index IN (SELECT h3index FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index < 700000000000000000 AND h3IsValid(h3index));
SELECT h3GetResolution(h3index) AS resolution FROM h3_indices WHERE h3index NOT IN (SELECT h3index FROM h3_indices WHERE h3IsValid(h3index));
